title: Senior Technical SEO Specialist
description:
Please read until the end. Applicants who do not follow instructions will not be entertained. 

Agencies please do not apply.



Our company is in need of someone to fill in the position of: Technical SEO Specialist (Senior) – Strategy + Execution (WordPress). We are hiring someone who can both develop strategy and execute implementation across B2B and B2C clients. This role is responsible for ensuring websites are technically sound, properly structured, and positioned to rank. You will own SEO from planning through execution, not just audits or recommendations.



You will work alongside a design and marketing team to ensure all websites and campaigns are SEO-ready at launch and continuously improving.



Your Work Schedule:

Part-time (20 hours/week) Monday to Friday and Flexible within Central business hours



Required Skills & Experience:

> 5+ years of hands-on SEO experience in a lead role (not support)

> Proven experience owning and executing technical SEO strategy

> Strong understanding of:

> Crawlability, indexation, and site architecture

> Core Web Vitals and page speed optimization

> Internal linking and URL structure

> On-page SEO best practices

> Experience with SEO tools: Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, Google Search Console

> Experience developing SEO strategies for B2B and/or B2C companies

> Ability to both plan and execute SEO initiatives independently

> Strong communication skills for internal collaboration and reporting

> Working knowledge of WordPress for page updates

> Basic HTML/CSS for minor updates and troubleshooting



Your Key Responsibilities:



Technical SEO & Strategy:

Lead technical SEO strategy for client websites (B2B and B2C)

Conduct full technical audits (crawlability, indexation, site structure, performance)

Develop keyword strategies, URL structures, and content mapping

Identify ranking opportunities through competitor and gap analysis

Diagnose and resolve ranking drops, indexing issues, and technical blockers



On-Page SEO Execution:

Implement on-page SEO: titles, meta descriptions, headers, internal linking

Optimize site architecture and internal linking strategies

Ensure proper use of canonical tags, schema, and structured data

Support content optimization aligned to search intent and keyword targets



Website Updates (WordPress): 

Handle basic site/plugin updates, page edits, and publishing as needed

Technical & Platform Support

Perform ongoing site health checks (Core Web Vitals, crawl errors, indexing)

Manage sitemap, robots.txt, and Search Console issues

Support DNS, domain, and hosting updates (WP Engine)

Recommend tools, processes, and improvements for SEO performance



Nice to Have (but not required):

> Experience with structured data / schema implementation

> Familiarity with Core Web Vitals optimization techniques

> Experience managing multiple client sites or campaigns

> Background working in an agency or multi-client environment
